channel.title: Parlor Room
channel.description: Latest releases from Parlor Room on Dropout.tv

item.title: Mixed Double on the Farm
item.description:
Vic, Jacob, Talia, Oscar, and Kimia make some bacon and play the dice game Pass the Pigs.

Duration: 51:54

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, vic michaelis, jacob wysocki, talia tabin, oscar montoya, kimia behpoornia
